Subclass.Name: Path of the Berserker
Subclass.Description: Focuses on pure rage and physical might.

Subclass.Name: Path of the Totem Warrior
Subclass.Description: A spiritual path that grants animal-like supernatural traits.

Subclass.Name: Life Domain
Subclass.Description: Focused on the vibrant positive energy that sustains life.

Subclass.Name: Champion
Subclass.Description: Focuses on raw physical power and critical hits.

Subclass.Name: Battle Master
Subclass.Description: Uses combat maneuvers to control the battlefield.

Subclass.Name: Thief
Subclass.Description: Burglars, bandits, and explorers who use agility.

Subclass.Name: Assassin
Subclass.Description: Focuses on the art of the kill and infiltration.
